ddls:
CREATE TABLE "baby_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each name */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the baby */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the baby (M/F) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the name was registered */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of occurrences of the name in that year */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Cultural or linguistic origin of the name */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Meaning or significance of the name */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the name was registered */,
  "is_famous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the name is associated with a famous person */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the name data (e.g., government records, user submissions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name being tracked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend is for */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the name in that year */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the name in that year */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the name is popular */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the babies */,
  "socioeconomic_status" TEXT /* Socioeconomic status of the families */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_trends_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "name_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variation */,
  "name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the name being varied */,
  "variation" TEXT /* Variation of the name (e.g. nickname, spelling variation) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of variation */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_name_variations_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("name_id") REFERENCES baby_names ("name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which data is available */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a leap year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the year data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex for which data is available (M/F) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sex */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, developer, public) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the API key is assigned */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key itself */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the API key was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date the API key expires */,
  "requests_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of requests allowed per day */,
  "requests_count" INTEGER /* Current number of requests made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API key making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_data" TEXT /* Data requested by the developer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the request */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request that resulted in the download */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the download was made */,
  "download_data" TEXT /* Data downloaded by the developer */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the downloaded file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the downloaded file */,
  "download_speed" REAL /* Download speed in bytes per second */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES data_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., number of users, number of downloads) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the metric is recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
